name: mixed-media-suite
title: Mixed Media Suite
description: Mixed-media suite foundation: install-graph descriptor for the assets, generation, editing, pipelines, review, publishing, and media-library lane.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/suite-manifest.generated.json",
  "name": "@jami-studio/mixed-media-suite",
  "lane": "mixed-media",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-09.registry-foundation",
  "items": [
    "jami-theme",
    "button",
    "panel",
    "data-list",
    "agent-panel",
    "media-grid",
    "mixed-media-app",
    "mixed-media-library-page",
    "mixed-media-pipeline-page",
    "mixed-media-assets-block",
    "mixed-media-metadata-block",
    "mixed-media-pipeline-block",
    "mixed-media-review-agent-block"
  ],
  "installGraph": {
    "root": "mixed-media-suite",
    "dependencies": [
      "jami-theme",
      "button",
      "panel",
      "data-list",
      "agent-panel",
      "media-grid",
      "mixed-media-app",
      "mixed-media-library-page",
      "mixed-media-pipeline-page",
      "mixed-media-assets-block",
      "mixed-media-metadata-block",
      "mixed-media-pipeline-block",
      "mixed-media-review-agent-block"
    ]
  },
  "plannedSurfaces": [
    "assets",
    "generation",
    "editing",
    "pipelines",
    "review",
    "publishing",
    "library"
  ],
  "shell": {
    "sourceSchemaVersion": "2026-06-09.suite-shell",
    "title": "Mixed Media",
    "summary": "A production shell for assets, generation, editing, pipelines, review, publishing, and media libraries.",
    "appShell": {
      "id": "app.mixed-media.shell",
      "layout": "media-production",
      "navigation": [
        {
          "label": "Library",
          "route": "/mixed-media/library"
        },
        {
          "label": "Pipeline",
          "route": "/mixed-media/pipeline"
        },
        {
          "label": "Review",
          "route": "/mixed-media/review"
        },
        {
          "label": "Publishing",
          "route": "/mixed-media/publishing"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routes": [
      {
        "path": "/mixed-media/library",
        "page": "page.mixed-media.library",
        "title": "Asset library",
        "blocks": [
          "block.mixed-media.assets",
          "block.mixed-media.metadata"
        ]
      },
      {
        "path": "/mixed-media/pipeline",
        "page": "page.mixed-media.pipeline",
        "title": "Generation pipeline",
        "blocks": [
          "block.mixed-media.pipeline",
          "block.mixed-media.review-agent"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "pages": [
      {
        "id": "page.mixed-media.library",
        "title": "Asset library",
        "description": "Media-grid library with asset metadata, long captions, and empty collection states.",
        "components": [
          "media-grid",
          "data-list",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "page.mixed-media.pipeline",
        "title": "Generation pipeline",
        "description": "Pipeline status, review queue, publishing readiness, and display-only agent state.",
        "components": [
          "data-list",
          "agent-panel",
          "media-grid",
          "panel"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "blocks": [
      {
        "id": "block.mixed-media.assets",
        "title": "Assets",
        "component": "media-grid",
        "stateExamples": [
          "empty",
          "long-content"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.mixed-media.metadata",
        "title": "Asset metadata",
        "component": "data-list",
        "stateExamples": [
          "long-content"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.mixed-media.pipeline",
        "title": "Pipeline runs",
        "component": "data-list",
        "stateExamples": [
          "error"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.mixed-media.review-agent",
        "title": "Review agent",
        "component": "agent-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "error"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "componentParts": [
      "agent-panel",
      "button",
      "data-list",
      "media-grid",
      "panel"
    ],
    "stateFixtures": {
      "longContent": "Generated asset filenames, prompt excerpts, and publishing notes wrap inside the media shell.",
      "empty": "An empty asset collection keeps a visible media-grid state.",
      "error": "Pipeline errors render as status panels without invoking provider or harness actions."
    },
    "provenance": {
      "source": "registry/suites/mixed-media/suite-shell.json",
      "copiedSource": false
    }
  },
  "implementation": {
    "status": "mounted-react-suite-implementation",
    "runtimeReactApp": true,
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "source": "packages/ui/src/suites.mjs",
    "app": "studio-ui/suites/mixed-media/mixed-media-app.implementation.json",
    "pages": [
      "studio-ui/suites/mixed-media/pages/mixed-media-library-page.page.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/suites/mixed-media/pages/mixed-media-pipeline-page.page.implementation.json"
    ],
    "blocks": [
      "studio-ui/suites/mixed-media/blocks/mixed-media-assets-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/suites/mixed-media/blocks/mixed-media-metadata-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/suites/mixed-media/blocks/mixed-media-pipeline-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/suites/mixed-media/blocks/mixed-media-review-agent-block.block.implementation.json"
    ]
  }
}

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Suite shell now installs generated route/page/block/component descriptors from authored source; full React app implementation remains pending.
